text:
BOTTOM LINE — Risk-on rebound, small caps led, oil plunged. Small caps outpaced large by 0.85pp amid post-Iran war stabilization, tech/AI strength, housing surge. Flows accumulated IWM/DIA on elevated volume, oil -7.79% decoupled from risk-on.

INDICES — VIX 17.5 down. IWM +2.16%, DIA +1.81%, IJH +1.97%, QQQ +1.31%, SPY +1.21%. Small > large by 0.85pp. SLV +3.35% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — Elevated: DIA 1.6x, IWM 1.1x, XLE 1.6x, XLY 1.0x. Declining: IJH 0.5x, XLC 0.5x, XLRE 0.5x. SPY/QQQ vol_ratio implicit in breadth; IWM vol up + price up signals accumulation, XLE vol up + price down distribution.

SECTORS — XLY Discretionary +2.36%, XLI Industrials +1.87%, XLK Technology +1.53%, XLRE Real Estate +1.53%, XLV Healthcare +1.49%, XLP Staples +1.26%, XLF Financials +0.77%, XLB Materials +0.25%, XLC Comms +0.23%, XLU Utilities -0.41%, XLE Energy -2.76%. Top industries WGMI +5.35%, JETS +4.84%; bottom XOP -4.84%, USO -7.79%.

THE 7s — Top5: Housing +3.50% (DHI strongest, strongest DHI), Old Metals +2.84% (weakest in top n/a), Industrial +2.67%, Buildout +2.58%, Fab +2.36%. Bot5: Energy -2.80% (weakest XLE), New Metals -0.91%, Power -0.78%, Defense -0.30%, New Staples -0.22%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Apr 29, CME hold 100%. Stance: Hawk 6 (Cook,Hammack,Kashkari,Logan,Barkin,Goolsbee), Neutral 5 (Powell,Williams,Barr,Jefferson,Paulson), Dove 4 (Bowman,Miran,Waller,Daly).

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.07 elevated protection, QQQ 2.54 very high fear; skew +7.4%/+7.6% put premium. GEX_flip SPY 699 > spot, QQQ 640 > spot. VIX 17.5 below 20d MA 23.4 complacency.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil USO -7.79% despite OVX 69 vol spike, decoupled from risk-on rebound post-Iran de-escalation. Silver SLV +3.35% led metals amid dollar flat -0.04%.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 62.1 Greed. Top movers WGMI +5.35% industries, JETS +4.84% industries, XHB +4.78% industries. 20d momentum: Old Metals +18.50% best sector/basket, Energy -6.71% worst sector, Energy -5.04% worst basket. Vol spikes NFLX 3.2x -9.72% New Staples distribution.

WATCH — IWM +2.16% vol 1.1x accumulation. DHI +0% (Housing 7 lead) earnings Apr 21. NFLX -9.72% 3.2x vol distribution probe.
